name: MeshChatX
description: The future of off-grid communication. Secure, decentralized, and unstoppable
compose:
name: slashnode-meshchatx
services:
  web:
    image: ghcr.io/quad4-software/meshchatx:4.7.1
    container_name: meshchatx
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      MESHCHAT_NO_HTTPS: 'true'
    volumes:
      - web_data:/config
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8985:8000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data:
    name: slashnode-meshchatx_web_data
